mapper.sql: select c.*, case c.owner_type when 'EXTERNAL_PROMOTER' then p.promoter_name when 'CUSTOMER_USER' then cu.nx_CU_wx_nick_name when 'COMMUNITY_USER' then cou.nx_COU_wx_nick_name end as owner_name, case c.owner_type when 'EXTERNAL_PROMOTER' then p.promoter_phone when 'CUSTOMER_USER' then cu.nx_CU_wx_phone_number when 'COMMUNITY_USER' then cou.nx_COU_wx_phone end as owner_phone, comm.nx_community_name as community_name from nx_customer_promotion_code c left join nx_customer_promoter p on c.owner_type = 'EXTERNAL_PROMOTER' and c.owner_id = p.nx_customer_promoter_id left join nx_customer_user cu on c.owner_type = 'CUSTOMER_USER' and c.owner_id = cu.nx_CU_user_id left join nx_community_user cou on c.owner_type = 'COMMUNITY_USER' and c.owner_id = cou.nx_community_user_id left join nx_community comm on c.community_id = comm.nx_community_id
mapper.select: select * from nx_customer_promotion_code where promotion_code = #{value} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into nx_customer_promotion_code (promotion_code, owner_type, owner_id, commerce_id, community_id, code_status, valid_start_at, valid_end_at, reward_rule_id) values (#{promotionCode}, #{ownerType}, #{ownerId}, #{commerceId}, #{communityId}, #{codeStatus}, #{validStartAt}, #{validEndAt}, #{rewardRuleId})
mapper.update: update nx_customer_promotion_code set use_count = use_count + 1 where nx_customer_promotion_code_id = #{value}
update nx_customer_promotion_code set valid_register_count = valid_register_count + 1 where nx_customer_promotion_code_id = #{value}
update nx_customer_promotion_code set invalid_register_count = invalid_register_count + 1 where nx_customer_promotion_code_id = #{value}
